one_time_description: Grant from sale of Ridley Terminal - non-recurring one-time revenue
economic_notes: Nation is guarantor on RBC loan for Tyee Building Supplies LP ($2,502,000) and Coast Industrial Construction Partnership ($13,500,000). Investments include Tyee Building Supplies partnership, North Coast Skeena CFE, and North-Co-Corp Ferry Services Ltd. Council intends to spend $45,084,200 from Provincial Coastal and LNG Benefit Agreements on LNG support, capacity building, community infrastructure, land development, economic development, and ferry infrastructure improvement.
notes: Large one-time $13M grant from sale of Ridley Terminal significantly inflated 2020 revenue and surplus. Provincial Coastal and LNG Benefit Agreements contributed $45,084,200 to operating surplus, representing the largest single component. Cash held in two lawyer trust accounts ($17,963,793) for future expenditures. Segment disclosure referenced but detailed table not fully visible in provided pages. Kitkatla Development Corporation carrying value is nil. Nation owns shares in three inactive corporations. No remuneration schedule provided in available pages.
